case_title: C & C SF OFFICE OF TRESURER TAX COLLECTOR VS. CHRISTIAN WILHELM BRUMAND

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF C & C SF OFFICE OF TRESURER TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BRUMUND, CHRISTIAN WILHELM

RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT / SENT TO DEFENDANT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C & C SF OFFICE OF TRESURER TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRUMUND, CHRISTIAN WILHELM $1,747.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,792.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT WHO STATES THE CORRECT SPELLING OF HIS SURNAME "BRUMUND". NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
